title: Solid Velvet Shirt
description:
Men’s Sage Green Solid Velvet Shirt

Step into luxury with our Sage Green Velvet Shirt. Velvet is a fabric defined by its "nap"- a dense, soft pile that catches and reflects light to create a multi-toned effect. In this muted Sage Green shade, the fabric offers a sophisticated alternative to traditional black or navy, providing a calm yet commanding presence at any high-profile social gathering.

Key Performance 

  • High-Density Velvet Pile: Engineered for a soft, plush hand-feel that provides subtle warmth and a premium visual luster.

  • Muted Sage Green Pigment: A contemporary, earthy tone that stays saturated and rich, resisting the "ashy" look common in lower-quality velvet.

  • Regular Fit Silhouette: Carefully cut to provide a comfortable, relaxed torso while maintaining sharp, structured lines across the shoulders and collar.

  • Durable Construction: Built with reinforced seams and high-quality buttons to ensure the delicate velvet surface is supported by a rugged frame.

Style Guide: 

  • The Formal After-Hours: Pair this sage green velvet piece with charcoal grey trousers and black patent leather shoes for a look that is both modern and regal.

  • Modern Contrast: Wear it with our Black Slim-Fit Denim and Chelsea boots. The matte finish of the denim allows the velvet’s sheen to become the visual focus.

  • Layered Luxury: Wear it open over a white ribbed tank top for a more relaxed, "celebrity-inspired" weekend look.

title: Vignette-Checkered Oversized Shirt
description: Make a bold statement with this Campus Sutra Shirt, designed for those who appreciate artistry and comfort. Crafted from smooth, lightweight Cotton-Blend, this shirt offers day-long comfort and a striking visual appeal. The Oversized-Fit and Spread Collar ensure a polished look, while the Long Cuffed Sleeves and Curved hem add a touch of sophistication. Perfect for casual outings, club wear, or weekend get-togethers, this shirt blends style and functionality seamlessly. The Woven fabric and Plaid pattern create a unique aesthetic that sets you apart from the crowd. With its Button closure and unlined design, this shirt is easy to wear and maintain. Whether you're dressing up for a party or keeping it casual, this shirt is an ideal choice for modern men who value style and affordability. Add this versatile piece to your wardrobe and experience the perfect combination of comfort, durability, and trendsetting design. Strong, dynamic essence for your quirky personality. Campus Sutra showcases a stylish edit that will instantly upgrade your look. Charming looks and infinite comfort – be it stylish all-over prints or solid pastels, our clothes are designed to ensure that you can be at the top of your style game. Our vast range of jackets, shirts, trousers and much more are curated to be dependable and relaxing.!

title: Solid Cotton Shirt
description:
Upgrade your wardrobe with the Campus Sutra Wine Red Solid Cotton Shirt- a timeless essential that blends simplicity and sophistication. Rich wine red and a clean solid finish make this shirt a perfect pick for effortless style, whether it’s a casual outing or a night out.

Made with premium cotton fabric, this shirt feels soft against the skin, breathable through the day, and comfortable enough for frequent wear. The tailored cut offers a balanced fit - not too tight, not too loose - giving you a sharp, clean silhouette that goes with jeans, chinos, or trousers.

 Why This Shirt Works

  • Premium cotton build - soft, breathable and perfect for Indian weather.

  • Solid wine-red tone - bold yet classic, easy to pair with jeans, trousers, or chinos.

  • Versatile styling - ideal for college, casual hangouts, office-casual setups, or low-key nights out.

  • Clean design, minimal fuss — no loud patterns or prints; easy to dress up or down depending on occasion.

title: Stripe-Creased Shirt
description:
Men’s Tan Brown Stripe-Creased Shirt

Step away from flat fabrics with the Tan Brown Stripe-Creased Shirt. This piece utilizes a specialized "Stripe-Crease" technique - similar to high-fashion plissé - creating permanent vertical ridges that run the length of the garment. This architectural detail not only adds a unique tactile dimension but also provides a subtle stretch and a fluid drape that moves naturally with the body.

Key Style Features

  • Architectural Stripe-Crease: A permanent vertical texture that provides visual height and a sophisticated, non-traditional aesthetic.

  • Warm Tan Brown Pigment: A versatile, earthy neutral that pairs effortlessly with both dark denim and light-toned trousers.

  • Soft-Touch Man-Made Fabric: Engineered for a lightweight, "liquid-like" feel on the skin while maintaining excellent shape retention and wrinkle-resistance.

  • Regular Fit Construction: Designed with a clean, structured shoulder and a comfortable torso, making it suitable for both professional environments and evening social events.

Style Guide: 

  • Modern Monochrome: Pair this tan creased shirt with our Khaki Brown Tailored Trousers for a sophisticated tonal look that emphasizes the interplay of different fabric textures.

  • Evening Edge: Wear it unbuttoned over a white pima cotton tank and Black Slim-Fit Denim. The vertical creases catch the light, making it a standout choice for night-out environments.

  • Casual Refinement: Combine with navy chinos and white leather sneakers to balance the shirt’s high-fashion texture with classic, grounded basics.
